title: GSoC 2026 — Accepted Contributors Announced
description: Google Summer of Code 2026 accepted contributor list goes live. If you applied, check your email and the GSoC portal immediately.

title: MLH Fellowship Summer 2026 — Applications Close
description: Last day to apply for the MLH Fellowship Summer 2026 batch starting May 18. Open Source, Software Engineering, and Production Engineering tracks available. Stipend ~$5,000.

title: GSoC 2026 — Coding Period Begins
description: The official GSoC 2026 coding period starts. Selected contributors begin working with their mentors. Community bonding period ends May 25.

title: LFX Mentorship Summer 2026 — Applications Open
description: LFX Summer 2026 applications open today. Projects span CNCF, Kubernetes, Hyperledger, and 20+ other foundations. Applications close May 27 — only 2 weeks window.

title: LFX Mentorship Summer 2026 — Applications Close
description: Final day to submit your LFX Mentorship Summer 2026 application. Internship runs June–August 2026. Stipend $3,000–$6,600.

title: Summer of Bitcoin 2026 — First Evaluation
description: Halfway point evaluation for Summer of Bitcoin 2026 contributors. 40% of the stipend is released on successful evaluation.

title: Outreachy December 2026 — Applications Expected Open
description: Outreachy December 2026–March 2027 cohort initial applications are expected to open in August. Stipend $7,000. Check outreachy.org for confirmed dates.

title: LFX Mentorship Fall 2026 — Applications Open
description: LFX Fall 2026 applications open. Internship runs September–November 2026. Applications close August 12.

title: Hacktoberfest 2026 — Starts
description: Hacktoberfest 2026 begins. Make 4 quality PRs to participating repositories throughout October to earn digital rewards. Perfect first-timer event.

title: GSoC Proposal + PR Review
description: Review session for GSoC 2026 proposals and PR quality. Bring your draft proposal or a PR you want feedback on.

title: Your First Merged PR — Live Walkthrough
description: Step-by-step: find a good issue, clone the repo, make the fix, open a clean PR. Beginner friendly.

title: LFX Mentorship Application Q&A
description: Open Q&A to prepare for LFX Summer 2026 applications opening May 14. Bring your project shortlist.
